title: Oxford Nanopore Technologies 16S Barcoding NGS Prep
author: Opentrons
description: This protocol performs a semi-automated solution for the [Oxford Nanopore 16S Barcoding NGS Prep](https://s3.amazonaws.com/pf-upload-01/u-4256/0/2022-02-22/yf03wql/16S%20Barcoding%20Kit%20SQK-RAB204-minion.pdf) ---
steps_raw: This protocol performs a semi-automated solution for the [Oxford Nanopore 16S Barcoding NGS Prep](https://s3.amazonaws.com/pf-upload-01/u-4256/0/2022-02-22/yf03wql/16S%20Barcoding%20Kit%20SQK-RAB204-minion.pdf) ---
Download your protocol and unzip if needed.
Upload your custom labware to the OT App by navigating to `More` > `Custom Labware` > `Add Labware`, and selecting your labware files (.json extensions) if needed.
Upload your protocol file (.py extension) to the OT App in the `Protocol` tab.
Set up your deck according to the deck map.
Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App. For calibration tips, check out our support articles.
materials_raw: Opentrons 4-in-1 Tube Rack Set with 4x6 insert for 1.5ml Eppendorf tubes
Applied Biosystems MicroAmp™ Optical 96-Well Reaction Plate #N8010560 seated in MicroAmp™ Splash-Free 96-Well Base #4312063
